parent_task: Create a Word file with one sentence
knowledge_need: The agent decomposed task X into ten parts and needs one coordinated draft explaining each part, dependencies, priority order, validation, and parent return plan without retaining raw source.

part_digests.name: create
part_digests.meaning: Produce a new artifact, not just describe steps.
part_digests.role_in_parent_task: Parent task succeeds only if a document is actually generated by the acting agent.
compact_missing_knowledge: Whether creation is allowed in the target workspace
Whether an existing file should be overwritten or avoided
part_digests.compact_safe_learning_steps: Confirm allowed output location and overwrite policy before mutation
part_digests.compact_validation_needed: A new or intended output artifact exists after execution
part_digests.return_to_parent_hint: Return as the action verb: create the artifact once path and content are known.

part_digests.name: file
part_digests.meaning: A saved filesystem object with bytes at a concrete path.
part_digests.role_in_parent_task: A Word document must persist as a file the parent can inspect or deliver.
part_digests.compact_safe_learning_steps: Use a bounded workspace path and avoid protected/runtime areas
compact_validation_needed: File size is greater than zero
part_digests.return_to_parent_hint: Return the final absolute or workspace-relative path to the parent.

part_digests.name: Word file
part_digests.meaning: A Microsoft Word-compatible .docx package, not plain text or markdown.
part_digests.role_in_parent_task: Defines the required format and extension for task acceptance.
compact_missing_knowledge: Whether .docx specifically is required versus legacy .doc
part_digests.compact_safe_learning_steps: Prefer a standard library or minimal valid OOXML package generator
compact_validation_needed: Package opens or parses as valid WordprocessingML
part_digests.return_to_parent_hint: Return format evidence showing the artifact is a valid docx.

part_digests.name: one sentence
part_digests.meaning: Exactly one sentence of textual content.
part_digests.role_in_parent_task: Controls the document payload and prevents extra prose or multiple sentences.
compact_missing_knowledge: The exact sentence text to use
part_digests.compact_safe_learning_steps: Ask or choose a neutral single sentence if the parent permits default content
compact_validation_needed: Extracted body text contains exactly one sentence

part_digests.name: inside document body
part_digests.meaning: The sentence appears in the main Word document body.
part_digests.role_in_parent_task: Ensures the content is visible as normal document text, not metadata only.
part_digests.compact_missing_knowledge: Whether headers, footers, comments, or properties are disallowed
part_digests.compact_safe_learning_steps: Write the sentence as a normal paragraph in document.xml body

part_digests.name: save path
part_digests.meaning: The chosen location and filename for the output document.
part_digests.role_in_parent_task: The parent needs a stable path to find and verify the artifact.
part_digests.compact_safe_learning_steps: Select a clear filename under the allowed workspace after checking collisions
compact_validation_needed: Resolved path is inside allowed scope
Final file exists at that path
part_digests.return_to_parent_hint: Return the path as the primary deliverable reference.

part_digests.name: tool/library
part_digests.meaning: The mechanism used to generate the .docx safely.
part_digests.role_in_parent_task: Avoids malformed handcrafted output when a reliable generator exists.
compact_missing_knowledge: Installed libraries or available platform tools
Whether no-command policy applies to the acting agent
compact_safe_learning_steps: Inspect available local dependencies only if execution is permitted
Prefer established libraries such as python-docx, PowerShell-compatible packaging, or existing repo helper
part_digests.compact_validation_needed: Generation mechanism reports success or produces parseable output
part_digests.return_to_parent_hint: Return the tool choice and why it was bounded.

part_digests.name: format structure
part_digests.meaning: The internal .docx OOXML zip structure required for Word compatibility.
part_digests.role_in_parent_task: Matters if no library is available or validation diagnoses malformed output.
compact_missing_knowledge: Whether the chosen tool abstracts structure correctly
part_digests.compact_safe_learning_steps: Rely on library output when possible; otherwise use minimal OOXML parts only
part_digests.compact_validation_needed: Zip contains required docx parts such as [Content_Types].xml and word/document.xml
part_digests.return_to_parent_hint: Return structural validation only if needed or if manual packaging is used.

part_digests.name: validation
part_digests.meaning: Checks proving the file exists, is valid docx, and contains one body sentence.
part_digests.compact_safe_learning_steps: Use a bounded read-only validation pass after creation
part_digests.return_to_parent_hint: Return validation results as proof pending parent acceptance.

part_digests.name: evidence return
part_digests.meaning: A concise report back to the parent with path, checks, and limitations.
part_digests.role_in_parent_task: Lets the parent task consume the result without retaining raw source details.
compact_missing_knowledge: Whether screenshots or hashes are wanted
part_digests.compact_safe_learning_steps: Report only final path, sentence, validation commands/checks, and status
compact_validation_needed: Evidence references the actual generated path
Evidence includes at least one content and format proof
part_digests.return_to_parent_hint: Return the final delivery packet for X.

dependencies: X2 depends on X1 and X6
X3 depends on X7 or X8
X5 depends on X4 and X3
X9 depends on X2, X3, X4, and X5
duplicates_or_overlaps: X4 overlaps X5 but X4 is content count while X5 is placement
X3 overlaps X8 but X3 is user-facing format while X8 is internal structure
X2 overlaps X6 but X2 is artifact existence while X6 is path choice
can_skip_for_now: X8 detailed manual structure can be skipped if a trusted docx library is used

parent_return_plan.how_to_rebuild_x: Choose an allowed save path, choose or receive one sentence, generate a .docx with that sentence as one normal body paragraph, validate existence/format/body text, then return path and proof.
parent_return_plan.next_small_action: Resolve the output path and exact sentence before writing anything.
proof_needed: Main document body contains exactly the chosen one sentence

promotion_decision.owner_decision_required: only if promotion beyond case pattern is requested
promotion_decision.reason: Batch source answer is material only; default is compact case pattern with part map and parent return plan.
